sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_time DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_time;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = toStartOfFifteenMinutes(event_time) WHERE event_time = toDateTime('2023-04-21 10:20:00');
SELECT event_time, toStartOfFifteenMinutes(event_time) AS rounded_time FROM test_dates;
SELECT COUNT(*), toStartOfFifteenMinutes(event_time) AS rounded_time FROM test_dates GROUP BY rounded_time;
